---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# ICFs

```{r setup}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| cache: false
#| comment: ""
library(ccn)
source("code/gt_theme.R")
```

## Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRF)

```{r}
ccn:::get_pin("irf")
```

## Long-Term Care Hospitals (LTCH)

```{r}
ccn:::get_pin("ltch")
```

## Rural Health Clinics (RHC)

```{r}
ccn:::get_pin("rhc")
```
